mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_tool_call ( id, task_id, tool_name, tool_type, status, request_json, response_json, ownership_verified, scope, error_code, error_message ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{taskId}, #{toolName}, #{toolType}, #{status}, #{requestJson}, #{responseJson}, #{ownershipVerified}, #{scope}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, tool_name, tool_type, status, request_json, response_json, ownership_verified, scope, error_code, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_tool_call WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, task_id, tool_name, tool_type, status, request_json, response_json, ownership_verified, scope, error_code, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_tool_call WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_tool_call SET status = #{status}, response_json = #{responseJson}, ownership_verified = #{ownershipVerified}, scope = #{scope}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
